daily.name: Japan
clues: In its native language, this country's name means 'origin of the sun'.
The capital has the world's busiest pedestrian scramble crossing.
An archipelago on the Pacific Ring of Fire with more than 6,800 islands.
Home to Mount Fuji, bullet trains, and cherry blossom season.
The Land of the Rising Sun.

bonus.name: Brazil
clues: The largest country in South America and the only Portuguese-speaking nation in the Americas.
Contains about 60% of the Amazon rainforest within its borders.
Its capital was purpose-built inland in the 1960s, while Rio hosts Carnival.
Famous for samba, the Christ the Redeemer statue, and five World Cup titles.
The fifth-largest country in the world by land area.
